name: Ashok Kumar
bio: I am a PhD candidate at the Telfer School of Management, uOttawa, specializing in Digital Transformation and Innovation (DTI). I did my Bachelor's from IIT Kharagpur and joined the DTI PhD program at Telfer School immediately after graduation.

During my undergrad studies, I have done various research projects at Telfer School of Management and IIT Kharagpur. My current research interest explores the intersection of finance and natural language processing, where I apply neural networks to analyze large-scale textual data.

My research has been published in Information Systems Frontiers, International Journal of Productivity and Performance Management, and PLOS One, with a paper currently under review at Information Systems Frontiers. I am also honoured to serve as a peer reviewer for Information Systems Frontiers (Springer).
